---
title: "scRNA-Seq"
author: "Audrey"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document
---

<style>
body {
text-align: justify}
</style>

# Reproducibility

We used :

* R version 3.6.3
* a lot of packages : in Singularity
* several Rmd files : ordered using Nextflow

## Singularity container

Container / Image was built under Singularity version XXX



## Install Singularity

Follow instructions here :

https://apptainer.org/docs-legacy/
